issue.label: ISSUE 001
issue.kicker: Nine coordinates for a complicated world
method.title: Verifiable facts. Distinct points of view.
method.body: Updated daily at 05:00 Beijing Time, 21:00 GMT on the previous day, with the nine global stories most worth knowing.
footer.note: Fact and opinion remain visibly separate. Errors are logged, corrected and disclosed.
